comingSoon.title: Something great is on the way
comingSoon.subtitle: Magic Resume is in private beta. We're putting the finishing touches on your AI resume workspace — the public launch is close.
comingSoon.reserveNote: Beta seats are limited — reserve now and we'll ping you the moment it opens.
comingSoon.noDate: The public launch is one step away. Stay tuned.

general.description: Preferences stay quiet and focused on choices that affect everyday editing.
general.appearanceDescription: Magic Resume currently stays in the dark workbench to reduce visual noise during long editing sessions.
general.languageDescription: Change the interface language without changing resume content.

empty.title: No notifications yet
empty.description: When people comment or reply to your resumes, they will appear here.

llm.title: Model Configuration
llm.description: Pick a provider and paste your own API key to enable AI. Your key is stored only in this browser and never uploaded.
llm.modelCustomPlaceholder: Enter a model name, e.g. llama3

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.description: Sync your resume data across devices. Your data will be stored securely in the cloud.
cloudSync.statusOn: Resume changes from this device will sync to the cloud so you can continue across devices.
cloudSync.statusOff: Resume data stays in this browser. You will review the upload notice before enabling sync.

disclaimer.title: Cloud Sync Disclaimer
disclaimer.description: Please read and agree to the following terms before enabling cloud sync:
disclaimer.content: By enabling cloud sync, your resume data (including personal info, experience, etc.) will be uploaded to our secure servers. This allows you to access your resumes from any device. We use industry-standard encryption to protect your data. However, please be aware that this means your data is no longer stored solely on your local device.

mcp.title: MCP Access
mcp.description: Create a personal access token and connect Magic Resume to Claude Code, Codex, or any MCP-compatible AI tool. The token is shown only once.
mcp.tokenCreatedDescription: Copy this token now. For your safety, Magic Resume will not show the full token again.
mcp.commandEmpty: Create a token to generate the Claude Code / Codex setup command.

notifications.signInRequired: Please sign in before enabling MCP access.

aiModal.title: AI Lab
aiModal.subtitle: Analyze and optimize your resume to match target job requirements, or get professional advice through Lighthouse-style reports.

placeholder.title: Get Professional Analysis
placeholder.description: Our AI will perform a detailed analysis of your resume, providing scores and actionable feedback on impact, clarity, and keyword optimization.

createTab.initialMessage: Hello! I'm ResuMate, your personal resume crafting assistant. To start, what kind of job or industry are you targeting?
createTab.defaultReply: Sorry, I'm having a little trouble right now. Could you please rephrase that?
createTab.errorReply: I seem to have encountered an issue. Please try sending your message again.
createTab.retryFailed: Request failed after multiple retries. Please try again later.

translateTab.inputDescription: Please choose target language, custom prompt is optional.
translateTab.resumeSourceHint: Current resume content will be translated directly.

customPrompt.label: Custom Prompt (Optional)
customPrompt.placeholder: e.g. Keep technical terms, make tone concise...

translateTab.outputDescription: Generated resume JSON is shown on the right with preview rendering.

reset.title: Start a new chat?
reset.descriptionRunning: The current generation will stop, and this resume's AI chat history, analysis, and canvas state will be cleared. This cannot be undone.
reset.descriptionIdle: This will clear this resume's AI chat history, analysis, and canvas state, then start a new session. This cannot be undone.
